docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO SEP-04-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-16-2025 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIN, XIAOLI
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-16-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-30-2025 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 09/12/2025. SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE MAILED TO PLANTIFF. (RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESS UNABLE TO FORWARD)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL 12/10/25. ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION TO XIAOLI LIN RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LIN, XIAOLI AS TO DEFENDANT SANTIAGO, JOSE MANUEL JR. AKA JOSE MANUEL SANTIAGO JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RESET HEARING DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIN, XIAOLI
COPYING FEES (12 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LIN, XIAOLI

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THERE WAS NO ANSWER ON THIRD AND FINAL ATTEMPT. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIN, XIAOLI AS TO DEFENDANT SANTIAGO, JOSE MANUEL JR. AKA JOSE MANUEL SANTIAGO JR.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIN, XIAOLI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT IN DURING THIRD ATTEMPT. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIN, XIAOLI AS TO DEFENDANT SANTIAGO, JOSE MANUEL JR. AKA JOSE MANUEL SANTIAGO JR.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: NO ANSWER ON THE THIRD AND FINAL ATTEMPT. THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT IN DURING THIRD ATTEMPT. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIN, XIAOLI AS TO DEFENDANT SANTIAGO, JOSE MANUEL JR. AKA JOSE MANUEL SANTIAGO JR.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-01-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF XIAOLI LIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE MANUEL JR. SANTIAGO IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: UNABLE TO GAIN ENTRY ON FINAL ATTEMPT. THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIN, XIAOLI AS TO DEFENDANT SANTIAGO, JOSE MANUEL JR. AKA JOSE MANUEL SANTIAGO JR.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF XIAOLI LIN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE MANUEL JR. SANTIAGO IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR DISMISSAL W/O PREJUDICE RE: NON APPEARANCE OF BOTH PARTIES
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE
